title: Retextured Minecraft
description: This resourcepack updates Minecraft textures in vanilla friendly way.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f929a3cc4bc1b46c6c1ec6fa281955582a29dc69.png)

Improves some of Minecraft textures and models in vanilla friendly way.
## Currently done:


<details>
<summary>Retextured Items</summary>
  
- Netherite, Diamond, Iron, Golden, Wooden, Stone tools
- Ender eye, Ender pearl
- Kelp
- Nether brick, Brick
- Snowball, Clay ball
- Iron, Gold, Copper ingots
- Minecarts
- Music disc 5 fragment
- Cyan dye, White dye, Purple dye, Lime dye, Orange dye, Light gray dye
- Flower pot, Hopper, Cauldron
- Barrier, Structure void
- Book, Knowledge book, Enchantment book
- Spider eye, Fermented spider eye
- Rabbit foot
- Gunpowder
- Shield
- Arrow, Tipped arrow

</details>




<details>
<summary>Retextured GUI</summary>
  
- Wither, Absorbed, Poison, Vehicle hearts
- Hunger bar
- Armor bar
- Experience bar
- Horse jump bar
- Bubbles
- Hotbar
- Gamemode switcher
- Effects background
- Spectator

</details>




<details>
<summary>Retextured Blocks</summary>
  
- Decorated, Flower pots 
- Torches 
- Dynamite 
- Banner 
- Rails
- Lever
- Ladder
- Magma
- Glow lichen

</details>





<details>
<summary>Other</summary>

- Torches have animation
- Torches have 3D model in hand
- Ladder have 3D model


</details>


</details>
